hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses with scalable data retention workflows, role-based access controls, and audit-ready evidence to meet institutional compliance and bank due diligence needs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Data retention lacks clear governance and traceability
problem_description: Enterprises struggle to maintain a consistent, auditable record of compliance data across multiple providers and jurisdictions. This creates risk during bank due diligence, regulatory review and internal audit without a defensible retention policy or strong access controls.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance data, enforces role-based access, records audit logs, and preserves tamper-proof evidence across multiple providers to support defensible data retention and streamline bank due diligence workflows.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit-ready logs
workflow_description: SFTY organizes role-based permissions, records user actions, and preserves evidence with controlled retention to support institutional audit and compliance readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that organizes provider outputs into structured workflows, supporting role-based access, governance, auditability and retention for regulated digital asset enterprises.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support audit-ready retention?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves evidence, decision logs and case records with configurable data retention policies, supporting defensible audit trails aligned to enterprise readiness and regulatory expectations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY manage case and evidence logs?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records detailed decision logs, links cases with supporting evidence, and maintains historical review trails to support transparency and traceability for supervisory and audit purposes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems into a connected compliance operating layer without disrupting current workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects and structures outputs from existing compliance providers but does not replace underlying KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule or screening services.
final_title: Review enterprise data retention workflows with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY helps VASPs structure audit-ready evidence retention and role-based access to support compliance and bank due diligence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
